svg.text: Voxelized screening visualization | 2.5D isometric view | longitudinal x-z field extruded across basin width for display
Case: svwtp_current_blocked_wall | Flow: 1.75 m3/s | Grid: 72 x 24 | Transparent water voxels are run-normalized speed bands, not literal 3D cells
- This is a 2.5D presentation of the current longitudinal screening field.
- Width is extruded uniformly for readability. This is not a full 3D solve.
- The transition wall is rendered as a solid panel for readability, even though v0.2 still models it as a loss interface.
- Relative speed bands are more honest here than absolute m/s because the present study still has large discharge-mismatch diagnostics.
Transparent water voxels show the display field only.
